criteria.name: feedback timing has no leakage violations
candidate reaches minimum accuracy on repaired tasks
candidate improves over v1.4 raw CRA
memory ablations are worse than candidate
candidate is competitive with best standard baseline
criteria.note: Strong baselines may still win some tasks, but candidate cannot be far behind before promotion.

tier_summary.claim_boundary: Software diagnostic only: explicit host-side context binding, not native CRA memory, sleep/replay, or hardware evidence.
